title: SIN-Scoreboard data manifests stale (>24h since last regeneration)
description: The `~REPORTS/scoreboard-data/*.json` manifests are produced by `tests/iter41-scoreboard-data-gen.ps1` and consumed via XHR by `~REPORTS/SIN-Scoreboard.xhtml`. Their `generated` timestamp must be refreshed any time sin_registry/, todo/, or modules/ change. Stale manifests cause the dashboard to misreport governance state (e.g., the audit on 2026-05-17 found a 13-day-stale manifest reporting 41 patterns when 44 existed on disk). The pipeline orchestrator MUST regenerate manifests at end-of-run, AND any standalone `Sync-PipelineRegistryFromDisk.ps1 -Apply` invocation MUST trigger a refresh.
detection_method: Read ~REPORTS/scoreboard-data/index.json; parse .generated; flag if (Get-Date) - .generated > 24h. Cross-check Get-ChildItem sin_registry/*.json count against patterns.json .count -- mismatch is also a stale or parse-drop signal.
remediation: Wire `& tests/iter41-scoreboard-data-gen.ps1` into `scripts/Sync-PipelineRegistryFromDisk.ps1` (post-write hook) AND into `scripts/Invoke-PipelineIntegrityCheck.ps1 -Refresh`. SIN-Scoreboard.xhtml drilldown displays a freshness badge derived from index.json.generated.
examples:
# Detection (PowerShell)
$idx = Get-Content ~REPORTS\scoreboard-data\index.json -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json
$age = (Get-Date) - [datetime]$idx.generated
if ($age.TotalHours -gt 24) { Write-Warning "Scoreboard stale by $([int]$age.TotalHours)h" }
